ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Lemon, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw

ingredients_text: _Anchois_ marinés 60 % (_anchois_, vinaigre d'alcool, sel, acidifiant : acide citrique), huile de tournesol 36%, sauce orientale 4 % (piment rouge fort, carottes, citrons confits, coriandre, cumin).
